Every once in a while, you're gonna walk in and you're gonna just naturally, because what's going on in your life and how you feel, how you slept, and bam, you're in that 10. You're just feeling absolutely certain and you're damn sure of it, right? That's gonna happen some days. And then probably once a year maybe, you know, you're just gonna be in like almost like a poop screw, like you just feel... You can't, you know, you're gonna be even sick by the way, where you're just like at the worst speed, you're uncertain. Whatever's going on, your wife just left you, the landlords are victing you, the last 50 people fucking slam the door in your face, everyone hung up the phone on you, you haven't closed in a week, whatever. Whatever's going on, your boss told you you're a... You're over-closing, you're a big a... All right? And you're just close to one, right? Well, now imagine your closing rate, imagine so you have a baseline, here's your 100%. So on your best day, in other words, based on your natural talent and how much training you have with the straight line, you're gonna have a baseline closing rate, where you'll close, let's say, five out of 10 people. On your best day, you don't close everyone, it's just not the way the world works, right? So on your best day, you'll close five. That's when you're at a 10, you're here. As you slide down here and your state diminishes each day, and then you give a day, this will go to four, three, two point, you get it? So you can't access the resources that you have. Okay? Does that kind of clarify the way this works? So it's not so black and white, or like you're walking in a disempowered state, and you don't close anybody. That's not what... And that's the mistake that we made. Is that, you know, it doesn't seem like it really matters that much state management, because you're like, well, you know, I can kind of... I can't... I can block it out. Maybe you can. Two like a seven or an eight. But I'm telling you, I myself, I can, my son knows, I can, no matter what the f***, you're going on in my life, right? But I can literally instantly snap into an ultra-empowered state, block everything out, and be the best I can be. That's me. It's weird. It's almost rare. It's very rare. It's weird. I can go from anger or negativity, right? In one split second, in a sales situation, I trigger that state. That's a natural ability I was born with, and somehow because of my weirdness got reinforced throughout my life. Most people aren't like me. And, you know, for everyone else, which is probably you, I have a solution for you that actually can make you like me. Not let me... Let me mind, okay? But I can show you a way to get yourself into that big state of absolute certainty at those key moments when it matters most.
